name: metabcr
description: MetaBCR: A Deep Learning Framework for Antibody-Antigen Interaction Prediction. Predicts binding affinity between antibodies and antigens (flu, SARS, RSV, HIV) using deep learning models. Supports streaming progress updates.

name: analyze_vdj_batch
description: V(D)J recombination analysis using IgBLAST + ChangeO. Returns AIRR format results with V/D/J gene assignments, CDR regions, and SHM identification. Automatically splits large files into batches for efficient processing.

name: predict_tcr_binding_fast
description: Fast TCR-peptide binding prediction using pre-trained NetTCR-2.2 models. 20-model TFLite ensemble for instant prediction. Supports 26 peptide-specific models with percentile rank, plus pan-specific fallback. Auto-detects input format (native 7-CDR or legacy CDR3+V-genes).

name: predict_tcr_binding_ensemble
description: Ensemble TCR-peptide binding prediction (backward-compatible wrapper). In NetTCR-2.2, ensemble size is always 20 models (5-fold CV x 4 validation splits). Wraps predict_tcr_binding_fast for API compatibility.

name: predict_tcr_binding_complete
description: Complete NetTCR-2.2 prediction pipeline with statistics and report. Full pipeline: validates input -> resolves CDR1/CDR2 -> runs 20-model ensemble -> computes percentile rank -> classifies binders -> outputs prediction CSV, statistics CSV, and summary report.

name: validate_tcr_input
description: Validate TCR input data format for NetTCR-2.2. Checks native format (peptide/A1-A3/B1-B3) or legacy format (CDR3a/CDR3b + V genes). Validates sequence lengths, amino acid composition, and V gene resolution capability.

name: check_peptide_support
description: Check if peptides have pre-trained NetTCR-2.2 models. Checks against 26 pre-trained peptide-specific models. Peptides without models fall back to pan-specific prediction.

name: list_available_peptides
description: List all 26 peptides with pre-trained NetTCR-2.2 models. Returns peptide sequences with model availability status. Pre-trained peptides support percentile rank rescaling.

name: tcell_celltype_visualization
description: T cell subtype UMAP visualization and distribution analysis. Performs marker-based T cell subtype classification (CD8+/CD4+ subtypes, MAIT, gdT) and generates UMAP plots with pie/bar charts.

name: tcell_marker_dotplot_analysis
description: T cell marker gene expression dotplot analysis. Creates dotplot visualization of marker genes across T cell subtypes (CD8: Naive/Effector/Memory/Exhausted; CD4: Naive/Th1/Th2/Th17/Treg/Tfh).

name: tcell_trajectory_analysis
description: T cell pseudotime trajectory analysis using monocle3. Performs trajectory inference for T cell differentiation (CD8: Naive->Effector->Memory/Exhausted; CD4: Naive->Th1/Th2/Th17/Treg/Tfh).

name: tcr_binding_visualization
description: TCR binding/reactivity prediction visualization. Visualizes TCR binding predictions on UMAP using Nebulosa density plots. Auto-detects binding columns and provides threshold classification.

name: tcr_clonotype_analysis
description: TCR clonotype expansion analysis. Analyzes TCR clonotype diversity and expansion patterns with top-N frequency charts, expansion categories on UMAP, and Shannon/Simpson diversity metrics.

name: integrate_tcr_data_complete
description: Complete TCR data integration pipeline. Integrates CSV prediction results (NetTCR, IgBLAST) with Seurat RDS objects by barcode matching. Includes UMAP computation and multi-lineage cell type annotation.

name: immune_celltype_visualization
description: Unified immune cell type UMAP visualization and distribution analysis. 2-pass hierarchical annotation: lineage first (T/B/Mono/NK/DC), then subtype within each lineage. Supports ~50 cell subtypes.

name: immune_marker_dotplot_analysis
description: Immune cell marker gene expression dotplot analysis. Creates dotplot of marker genes across all immune cell types (T, B, myeloid, NK, granulocyte, stromal).

name: immune_trajectory_analysis
description: Immune cell pseudotime trajectory analysis using monocle3. Auto-subsets to specified lineage (T/B/Mono/NK), recomputes UMAP, and performs trajectory inference with auto-selected root cell type.

name: immune_deg_analysis
description: Differential expression gene analysis between immune cell types. Uses Seurat FindMarkers/FindAllMarkers with volcano plot generation and FDR-adjusted p-values.

name: immune_cellchat_analysis
description: Cell-cell communication analysis using CellChat. Analyzes signaling networks between immune cell types. Supports Secreted Signaling, ECM-Receptor, and Cell-Cell Contact databases.

name: immune_isolate_cells
description: Isolate specific cell lineage from mixed population. Subsets Seurat object to extract specific lineages (T_cell, B_cell, Monocyte, Macrophage, NK, DC, etc.). Auto-annotates if needed.

name: immune_comprehensive_analysis
description: Quick comprehensive immune cell analysis pipeline. Runs CellType + DotPlot analysis in sequence for complete immune landscape overview.

name: bcell_celltype_visualization
description: Visualize B cell subtypes on UMAP with marker-based annotation. Annotates B cell subsets (Naive, Activated, PreGC, DZ_GC, LZ_GC, Cycling_GC, Memory, AtypicalMemory, Plasmablast, Plasma) using canonical markers.

name: bcell_marker_dotplot
description: Generate DotPlot of B cell marker gene expression across subtypes. Supports marker subsets: all, gc (germinal center), memory, plasma. Shows scaled expression and percent expressed.

name: bcell_binding_visualization
description: Visualize BCR binding/antigen reactivity predictions on UMAP. Auto-detects binding columns, calculates average scores, highlights reactive cells. Supports Nebulosa density plots.

name: bcell_trajectory_analysis
description: Perform B cell pseudotime trajectory analysis using Monocle3. Learns differentiation trajectory from Naive to Plasma cells with pseudotime ordering.

name: bcell_shm_analysis
description: Analyze somatic hypermutation (SHM) rates from AIRR data. Calculates SHM rate from V-region identity, visualizes distribution by B cell subset and gene family.

name: bcell_isotype_analysis
description: Analyze BCR isotype (immunoglobulin class) distribution. Extracts c_call from AIRR data, visualizes isotype frequency and distribution by B cell subset.

name: bcell_clonotype_analysis
description: Analyze BCR clonotype expansion and clonal diversity. Calculates frequencies, assigns expansion categories (Singleton/Small/Medium/Large/Hyperexpanded), computes Shannon/Simpson diversity.

name: bcell_vdj_analysis
description: Analyze V(D)J gene family usage from AIRR data. Extracts V/D/J gene calls, calculates usage frequencies, generates V-J pairing heatmap and V gene by cell type heatmap.

name: bcell_diversity_analysis
description: Calculate BCR repertoire diversity metrics grouped by specified column. Computes Shannon entropy, Simpson diversity, Hill numbers (q0/q1/q2), clonality, and rank abundance curves.

name: bcell_deg_analysis
description: Perform differential gene expression analysis between two B cell groups. Auto-selects biologically meaningful comparisons. Generates volcano plot with gene labels and top DEG heatmap.

name: bcell_gc_analysis
description: Analyze germinal center (GC) dynamics: Dark Zone vs Light Zone. Computes DZ/LZ ratio, performs DZ vs LZ DEG analysis with volcano plot, visualizes GC marker expression.

name: bcell_plasma_prediction
description: Predict plasma cell differentiation potential using gene signatures. Combines positive regulators (PRDM1, XBP1, IRF4) and negative regulators (PAX5, BCL6, BACH2) into composite score.

name: bcell_maturation_analysis
description: Analyze affinity maturation by correlating SHM rates with pseudotime. Fits polynomial regression, tracks gene program signatures along differentiation trajectory.

name: bcell_cytotrace_analysis
description: Predict B cell differentiation state using CytoTRACE algorithm. Uses gene counts correlation to estimate stemness. High score = less differentiated (more stem-like).

name: metabcr
description: MetaBCR inference: Predict antibody-antigen binding affinity using pre-trained deep learning models. Supports flu, SARS, RSV, HIV antigens. Returns prediction scores and classifications.

name: metabcr_train_subprocess
description: MetaBCR training (non-blocking): Launch model training as a background process. Returns process ID and log file path. Training output can be monitored externally.

name: metabcr_train
description: MetaBCR training (blocking): Run model training with real-time streaming progress. Captures training loss, validation metrics, and fold completion updates.

name: metabcr_train_with_new_data
description: MetaBCR fine-tuning with new experimental data. Accepts labeled data, concatenates with base training data, performs k-fold split, and fine-tunes the model. Returns new config_date for immediate inference use.

name: metabcr_check_training_status
description: Check the status of a running or completed MetaBCR training task. Returns progress information and training status.
